You may have S.N.O.T. enter stuck to another creature named S.N.O.T. If you do, all those creatures form a single creature.
S.N.O.T.'s power and toughness are each equal to the square of the number of cards named S.N.O.T. stuck together to form it. (One is a 1/1, two are a 4/4, three are a 9/9, and four are a 16/16. If you manage to get -1 S.N.O.T.s stuck together, it's a 1/1.)

data.name: Elvish Handservant
data.oracle_text: Whenever a player casts a Giant spell, you may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
data.flavor_text: The hardest lesson for any elf to learn is humility. It takes a giant to teach that.

data.name: Goblin Patrol
data.oracle_text: Echo {R} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.)
data.flavor_text:
"Take the sharp metal stick and make a lotta holes."
—Jula, goblin raider

data.name: Granger Guildmage
data.oracle_text:
{R}, {T}: This creature deals 1 damage to any target and 1 damage to you.
{W}, {T}: Target creature gains first strike until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
Leave no mouth agape, no stomach unfilled.
—Granger Guild maxim

data.name: Crossroads Consecrator
data.oracle_text: {G}, {T}: Target attacking Human gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: "May the steel of your blade match the steel in your soul."

data.name: Duskwalker
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {3}{B} (You may pay an additional {3}{B} as you cast this spell.)
If this creature was kicked, it enters with two +1/+1 counters on it and with fear. (It can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or black creatures.)

data.name: Ali Baba
data.oracle_text: {R}: Tap target Wall.
data.flavor_text:
"When he reached the entrance of the cavern, he pronounced the words, 'Open, Sesame!'"
—*The Arabian Nights*, Junior Classics trans.

data.name: T.A.P.P.E.R.
data.oracle_text: {T}, Tap an untapped creature you control that has a hat: Tap target creature.
data.flavor_text:
"'Technologically-Advanced People-Pleasing Entertainment Robot', eh? Nice hat. Would be a shame if something happened to it."
—"Brims" Barone, midway mobster

data.name: Balduvian Shaman
data.oracle_text: {T}: Change the text of target white enchantment you control that doesn't have cumulative upkeep by replacing all instances of one color word with another. (For example, you may change "black creatures can't attack" to "blue creatures can't attack.") That enchantment gains "Cumulative upkeep {1}." (At the beginning of its controller's upkeep, that player puts an age counter on it, then sacrifices it unless they pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.)

data.name: Aisling Leprechaun
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked by a creature, that creature becomes green. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

data.name: Rogue Elephant
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, sacrifice it unless you sacrifice a Forest.
data.flavor_text:
"When are trees like grass?"
—*The One Thousand Questions*

data.name: Priest of Iroas
data.oracle_text: {3}{W}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target enchantment.
data.flavor_text: "Even my last breath will be a blow struck for Iroas."

data.name: Straw Golem
data.oracle_text: When an opponent casts a creature spell, sacrifice this creature.
data.flavor_text:
"Don't look at me. *I* didn't build it."
—Hanna, *Weatherlight* navigator

data.name: Samite Censer-Bearer
data.oracle_text: {W}, Sacrifice this creature: Prevent the next 1 damage that would be dealt to each creature you control this turn.
data.flavor_text: Samite alchemists extracted aromatic traces of healing minerals from the residue of the receding salt dunes.

data.name: Stream Hopper
data.oracle_text: {U/R}: This creature gains flying until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Like many who dwell in Shadowmoor now, he was robbed of his better half by the Aurora.

data.name: Serra Zealot
data.oracle_text: First strike
data.flavor_text:
"The humans are useful in their way, but they must be commanded as the builder commands the stone. Be soft with them, and they will become soft."
—Radiant, archangel

data.name: Gustcloak Runner
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature becomes blocked, you may untap it and remove it from combat.
data.flavor_text: Cabal spies trying to follow the Order's movements are constantly frustrated by tracks that stop dead.

data.name: Wolf Cove Villager
data.oracle_text: This creature enters tapped.
data.flavor_text: Life is simply slower in the snow. Nobody knows that better than the villagers of Wolf Cove.

data.name: Volunteer Militia
data.flavor_text: After making the Peach Garden Oath, the three brothers raised an army of 500 youths to fight the Yellow Scarves rebellion.

data.name: Flamekin Bladewhirl
data.oracle_text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, reveal an Elemental card from your hand or pay {3}.
data.flavor_text:
"The elves may try to confine us, but they will learn that our blazing spirit can never be suppressed."
—Vessifrus, flamekin demagogue

data.name: Tattermunge Maniac
data.oracle_text: This creature attacks each combat if able.
data.flavor_text: It shows up at one meal wearing the carcass of the last.

data.name: Wandering Ones
data.flavor_text:
"I saw them once, when I was a child. They led me to my parents' arms when I was lost. Why have they abandoned me now? Why won't they take me home again?"
—Unnamed beggar

data.name: Kris Mage
data.oracle_text: {R}, {T}, Discard a card: This creature deals 1 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text: Her blade draws blood without ever touching its target.

data.name: Death Speakers
data.oracle_text: Protection from black
data.flavor_text:
"Such innocent little birds. They sing a sweet song, sitting on their fragile branch."
—Grandmother Sengir

card_faces.name: Town Gossipmonger
card_faces.oracle_text: {T}, Tap an untapped creature you control: Transform this creature.

card_faces.name: Incited Rabble
card_faces.oracle_text:
This creature attacks each combat if able.
{2}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
card_faces.flavor_text: Rumors are sparks: gather enough of them and something's going to catch fire.

data.name: Devout Monk
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: Discipline wears many robes.

data.name: Roc Hatchling
data.oracle_text:
This creature enters with four shell counters on it.
At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a shell counter from this creature.
As long as this creature has no shell counters on it, it gets +3/+2 and has flying.

data.name: Jackal Familiar
data.oracle_text: This creature can't attack or block alone.
data.flavor_text:
"Let the gray-hairs keep their ravens and drakes. My familiar will be a reflection of me: bloodthirsty, with a predator's instinct."
—Taivang, barbarian warlord

data.name: Brokers Initiate
data.oracle_text: {4}{G/U}: This creature has base power and toughness 5/5 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Regarding the relative might of pen and sword, the official position of the Brokers is "Why choose?"

data.name: Godo's Irregulars
data.oracle_text: {R}: This creature deals 1 damage to target creature blocking it.
data.flavor_text: Godo trained their muscles and honed their skills, but he left their hearts wild and empty.

data.name: Songstitcher
data.oracle_text: {1}{W}: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn by target attacking creature with flying.
data.flavor_text: The true names of birds are songs woven into their souls.

data.name: Odious Trow
data.oracle_text: {1}{B/G}: Regenerate this creature.
data.flavor_text: Trows are the vile trolls that lurk in the bogs of Shadowmoor. They reappear each night to frighten the living and gnaw the dead.

data.name: Diregraf Escort
data.oracle_text:
Soulbond (You may pair this creature with another unpaired creature when either enters. They remain paired for as long as you control both of them.)
As long as this creature is paired with another creature, both creatures have protection from Zombies.

data.name: Wee Champion
data.oracle_text: Whenever you place a sticker, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If it's an art sticker, instead put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
data.flavor_text: Nobody had ever won the bear, but then again, nobody had ever wanted it quite as much.

data.name: Netter en-Dal
data.oracle_text: {W}, {T}, Discard a card: Target creature can't attack this turn.
data.flavor_text: The wizard's vocabulary of mogg profanities increased with every net she cast.

data.name: Mtenda Herder
data.oracle_text: Flanking (Whenever a creature without flanking blocks this creature, the blocking creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.)
data.flavor_text:
"All animals—even humans—can be herded. The trick is to make them think they choose their own destination."
—Mangara

data.name: Shadow Guildmage
data.oracle_text:
{U}, {T}: Put target creature you control on top of its owner's library.
{R}, {T}: This creature deals 1 damage to any target and 1 damage to you.
data.flavor_text:
To keep the dead so others may live.
—Shadow Guild maxim

data.name: Dedicated Martyr
data.oracle_text: {W}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.
data.flavor_text:
"If he's so willing to suffer for his cause, then by all means, let us oblige him."
—Cabal Patriarch

data.name: Rag Dealer
data.oracle_text: {2}{B}, {T}: Exile up to three target cards from a single graveyard.
data.flavor_text:
"After General Takeno found the Oathkeeper amidst the bamboo marshes, more scavengers braved the swamp's nezumi, oni, and kami in hopes of glory."
—*The History of Kamigawa*

data.name: Kitsune Diviner
data.oracle_text: {T}: Tap target Spirit.
data.flavor_text: She who once led prayers honoring the kami adapted to use her influence to stay them.

data.name: Sacred Prey
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature becomes blocked, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: To see one is a good omen to the Cho-Arrim.

data.name: Frilled Sandwalla
data.oracle_text: {1}{G}: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Even the smallest creatures are fierce in defense of their own territory."
—Vivien Reid

data.name: Icatian Scout
data.oracle_text: {1}, {T}: Target creature gains first strike until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Because the orc hordes attacked along the entire border, Scouts were essential to Icatia's defense."
—*Sarpadian Empires, vol. VI*

data.name: Kill-Suit Cultist
data.oracle_text:
This creature attacks each combat if able.
{B}, Sacrifice this creature: The next time damage would be dealt to target creature this turn, destroy that creature instead.
data.flavor_text: Dressed to kill.

data.name: Cabaretti Initiate
data.oracle_text: {2}{R/W}: This creature gains double strike until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Now there's a fellow who knows how to have a good time!"
—Jetmir

data.name: Quicksilver, Brash Blur
data.oracle_text:
If Quicksilver, Brash Blur is in your opening hand, you may begin the game with him on the battlefield.
Haste
Power-up — {4}{R}: Put a +1/+1 counter and a double strike counter on Quicksilver. (Activate each power-up ability only once. Reduce the cost by his mana cost if he entered this turn.)

data.name: Pouncing Jaguar
data.oracle_text: Echo {G} (At the beginning of your upkeep, if this came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.)
data.flavor_text: One pounce, she's hungry—you die quickly. Two, she's teaching her cubs—you're in for a long day.

data.name: Imperial Lancer
data.oracle_text: This creature has double strike as long as you control a Dinosaur.
data.flavor_text: "Together my mount and I are stronger than either of us apart."

data.name: Nightscape Apprentice
data.oracle_text:
{U}, {T}: Put target creature you control on top of its owner's library.
{R}, {T}: Target creature gains first strike until end of turn.

data.name: Harvest Mage
data.oracle_text: {G}, {T}, Discard a card: Until end of turn, if you tap a land for mana, it produces one mana of a color of your choice instead of any other type and amount.
data.flavor_text: "Why should one limit oneself to the resources at hand?"

data.name: Insidious Bookworms
data.oracle_text: When this creature dies, you may pay {1}{B}. If you do, target player discards a card at random.

data.name: War Falcon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
This creature can't attack unless you control a Knight or a Soldier.
data.flavor_text: The falcon is the picture of nobility, maintaining a regal bearing even as it conducts the bloody business of war.

data.name: Martyr of Spores
data.oracle_text: {1}, Reveal X green cards from your hand, Sacrifice this creature: Target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: "Weep not for me. I will rise with the spring's new growth."

data.name: Gearsmith Prodigy
data.oracle_text: This creature gets +1/+0 as long as you control an artifact.
data.flavor_text: Young artificers on Kaladesh let their imaginations run wild.

data.name: Devoted Hero
data.flavor_text: The heart's courage is the soul's guardian.

data.name: Nafs Asp
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature deals damage to a player, that player loses 1 life at the beginning of their next draw step unless they pay {1} before that draw step.

data.name: Slithering Shade
data.oracle_text:
Defender (This creature can't attack.)
{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
Hellbent — This creature can attack as though it didn't have defender as long as you have no cards in hand.

data.name: Lionheart Maverick
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance
{4}{W}: This creature gets +1/+2 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: "Your signet is no symbol of power. It marks only your need for numbers to aid you. What do you do, guild-rat, now that you face my blade alone?"

data.name: Manta Riders
data.oracle_text: {U}: This creature gains flying until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Water is firmament to the finned."
—Oracle *en*-Vec

data.name: Charm Peddler
data.oracle_text: {W}, {T}, Discard a card: The next time a source of your choice would deal damage to target creature this turn, prevent that damage.

data.name: Keeper of Kookus
data.oracle_text: {R}: This creature gains protection from red until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Wanted: Thick-skinned goblin for guarding mean ol' Kookus. Must like fires. Must heal quickly.

data.name: Mountain Bandit
data.oracle_text: Haste
data.flavor_text: Penniless and far from home, many former Yellow Scarves and other soldiers became bandits to survive.

data.name: Triton Shorethief
data.flavor_text:
At sunrise, the Champion and her companions awoke to find their supplies gone and Brygus, their sentry, dead. Carefully arranged piles of ornamental shells gave a clear warning: go no further.
—*The Theriad*

data.name: Martyr of Ashes
data.oracle_text: {2}, Reveal X red cards from your hand, Sacrifice this creature: This creature deals X damage to each creature without flying.
data.flavor_text: She turns ash into flame and burns enemies to ash.

data.name: Eager Cadet
data.flavor_text: "Training? Seeing my crops burnt to cinders was all the 'training' I needed."
